channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: France Restricts US Ambassador Charles Kushner's Access to Government Officials After He Skips Summoned Meeting
item.description: Tensions between France and the United States have escalated following a diplomatic incident involving US Ambassador to France Charles Kushner, the father of Jared Kushner and a controversial appointe...

item.title: BBC Apologises for Airing Racial Slur Due to Tourette's Tic at Baftas, Reveals Another Slur Was Edited Out
item.description: During the 2026 Bafta Film Awards broadcast on BBC, a racial slur (the N-word) was inadvertently aired when Tourette's syndrome campaigner John Davidson shouted it involuntarily as actors Michael B. J...

item.title: Dubai Airport Evacuated After Iranian Suicide Drone Attack
item.description: Dubai International Airport was evacuated after an Iranian suicide drone reportedly struck one of its terminals, causing significant panic. The incident, which took place amid rising tensions in the M...

item.title: Presearch’s Doppelgänger Tool Helps Users Discover Adult Creators Based on Celebrity Looks
item.description: Presearch, a decentralized search engine, has launched a new feature called Doppelgänger, designed to help users discover adult content creators who resemble celebrities or people they find attractive...

item.title: The Evolutionary Mystery of Early Animals Without Skeletons
item.description: New research from the University of Bristol has redefined our understanding of the first animals on Earth. Sponges, considered among the oldest known animals, are now believed to have existed without ...

item.title: BBC Radio 4 Special Examines Impact of England’s SEND Reforms on Families and Schools
item.description: BBC Radio 4’s Woman’s Hour presents a special programme in collaboration with the SEND in the Spotlight podcast, focusing on the UK government’s proposed reforms to Special Educational Needs and Disab...

item.title: Starmer's Conversation with Trump Amidst Diverging UK-US Stance on Iran Strikes
item.description: A recent phone call between US President Donald Trump and UK Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer has drawn attention, particularly due to the contrasting positions held by the UK and the US on the recent ...

item.title: Germany's Shift: From Reluctance to Leading Support for Ukraine Amid War
item.description: Germany's response to Russia's invasion of Ukraine has evolved dramatically since 2022. Initially criticized for providing only 5,000 helmets to Kyiv, Berlin is now Ukraine's largest military supporte...

item.title: Achraf Hakimi Confirms Upcoming Trial Following Rape Allegation in France
item.description: Paris St-Germain defender Achraf Hakimi has confirmed that he is set to face trial following an allegation of rape made by a 24-year-old woman. The accusation relates to an incident alleged to have ta...

item.title: Comparing Solar Panel Grants and Upfront Payments for UK Households
item.description: As energy bills remain high, solar panels are becoming an attractive option for many UK households. While upfront installation costs of solar panels range from £6,000 to £9,000, grants and funding sch...

item.title: Rising Trend of GPs Choosing Private Practice Over NHS Work
item.description: In the face of increasing pressures on the NHS, many GPs are opting for private practice as a means of better managing their workloads and avoiding burnout. Dr Yvonne Girgis-Hanna, who divides her tim...

item.title: Lack of Evidence Behind Big Tech's Claims That Generative AI Will Solve Climate Change
item.description: Tech companies, including Google and OpenAI, have made bold claims that generative AI could significantly combat climate change by reducing global greenhouse gas emissions. However, a recent analysis ...

item.title: The Devastating Impact of Prolonged Use of ChatGPT on Mental Health
item.description: Joe Ceccanti, once an enthusiastic techie and advocate for sustainable housing, tragically died after becoming consumed by his interactions with ChatGPT. Initially using the chatbot to brainstorm idea...

item.title: Metadata Leak Reveals Key Figures Behind ICE's Mega Detention Center Proposal
item.description: A PDF document detailing the Department of Homeland Security’s (DHS) plans for building 'mega' detention and processing centers across the U.S. accidentally exposed metadata and comments identifying k...

item.title: Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei killed in US-Israeli airstrike
item.description: Iran's Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, has been killed in a joint US-Israeli military strike, marking a dramatic escalation in tensions in the Middle East. Announced by both Iranian state tele...

item.title: UK Regulator Fines Reddit £14.47m for Inadequate Child Age Verification Measures
item.description: Reddit has been fined £14.47 million by the UK’s Information Commissioner’s Office (ICO) for unlawfully processing children’s personal data and failing to implement effective age verification measures...

item.title: Trump's Travel Ban and Economic Speech: A Strategic Distraction
item.description: In December 2025, President Donald Trump signed a sweeping travel ban that quietly affected 19 countries, most of them Muslim-majority or from the Global South, as well as individuals holding Palestin...

item.title: Iran retaliates with missile strikes after the killing of Supreme Leader Khamenei by US and Israel
item.description: Following the death of Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei in a US-Israeli airstrike, Iran launched retaliatory missile attacks at targets in Israel and Gulf states, including Bahrain, Kuwait...

item.title: Highlights and Standout Moments from the Brit Awards 2026
item.description: The Brit Awards 2026 celebrated the best in British and international pop music, with Olivia Dean taking the lead, winning all four of her nominated categories, including Artist of the Year and Best A...

item.title: US and Israel initiate military action against Iran, Trump calls for regime change
item.description: The US and Israel have launched significant military strikes against Iran, marking the start of what President Donald Trump has described as a 'major combat operation.' The strikes, targeting multiple...
